items.summary: As indictments mount, fans and stock investors are losing trust that only an integrity commissioner can restore.

items.headline: FedEx beats on top and bottom lines, raises guidance on strong performance
items.summary: FedEx posted strong fiscal third quarter results on Thursday and raised its guidance following a strong performance.

items.headline: Investors are bracing for wild trading on Friday as first ‘triple witching’ of 2026 collides with Iran conflict
items.summary: Friday is the first day of spring. It is also the first “triple-witching” options expiration during what has already been a busy year for markets.

items.headline: Trump administration looks to shift student-loan responsibilities to Treasury Department

items.headline: Iran war-induced fertilizer shortage threatens Republicans in farm states ahead of midterms
items.summary: Democrats are vying for competitive seats across farm country in 2026, and fertilizer shortages spurred by the Iran war give them a new affordability angle.

items.headline: FedEx is getting more upbeat about the year, despite surging fuel costs
items.summary: Shares of FedEx rose in extended trading Thursday after the package-delivery giant said it expected slightly better sales and profits for this year, even as the Iran war threatens larger shipping disruptions and drives fuel prices higher.

items.headline: Figma's stock drops 12% in two days after Google releases 'vibe design' product

items.headline: Gold and silver sell-off accelerates as inflation fears grip global markets

items.headline: Apple bears are proven wrong yet again as iPhone defies the China slump narrative
